text:
おつかれさまーっ！
うんうん、チョコも無事そうだね！
これにて耐久試験、完了っと！

熱だけじゃなくて、衝撃なんかにも
しっかり耐えて、それでいておいしい
チョコレートも、完成間近！

あとは、飾り付けとか
隠し味とか、アレンジ部分かな……

ま、それを考えるのがわたしの仕事！
それじゃ、本当にありが

Hey, welcome back! Looks like the chocolate
is safe and sound! That's the end of the
durability test!

We've seen that the chocolate stands up not
only to heat, but to impact as well! I'm getting
closer to making the perfect chocolate!

All that's left is the decoration, secret
ingredients, as well as my own special
touch...

But that's my job to come up with those
things! Thank you so much for your efforts!
